overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a Gothic-style magical school common room with stone walls, tall arched windows with purple curtains, and students in robes relaxing around tables with glowing crystal orbs. The scene features detailed tapestries and warm natural lighting, characteristic of high-quality game engine rendering from a fantasy setting.

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting a robed figure with astronomical or fortune-telling imagery against a starry blue background
tall arched Gothic window with stone tracery allowing diffused natural light to enter
tall arched window with bright sunlight streaming through heavy purple curtains
heavy purple drapes framing the center window, tied back with gold cords
circular wooden tables with ornate legs arranged throughout the seating area
illuminated crystal balls on metal stands emitting soft magical light
round upholstered poufs in red and gold fabrics used for seating around tables

segments.scene_description: A static view of a magical school common room featuring Gothic stone architecture, tall arched windows with purple curtains, and students in robes relaxing around tables with glowing crystal orbs. The atmosphere is calm and studious, interrupted only by two students entering from opposite sides of the room and walking through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic view of a Gothic magical common room that maintains a calm, studious atmosphere as students move through the space. It begins with a wide perspective of the stone architecture, highlighting tall arched windows draped in purple curtains and students gathered around tables with glowing crystal orbs. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is gently broken by the arrival of two students who enter from opposite sides of the room. The camera remains fixed, capturing their crossing paths as they navigate the detailed environment of tapestries and warm natural light.
